title: Toasty Chicken Delight
description: A simple yet flavorful dish made with toasted bread and marinated chicken.
instructions: Marinate the chicken in a mixture of 1 tablespoon olive oil, 1 tablespoon lemon juice, 1 minced garlic clove, and 1 teaspoon dried oregano for at least 30 minutes.
Brush the toasted bread slices with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Bake the chicken in the oven for 20-25 minutes or until cooked through.
Grill the toasted bread slices until lightly browned.
Assemble the dish by placing a slice of the toasted bread on a plate, topping it with a slice of the baked chicken, and serving immediately.
